title: 3-Ingredient Peanut Butter Biscuits
excerpt: Quick peanut butter biscuits with just three ingredients: peanut butter, castor sugar and an egg.

seo.title: 3-Ingredient Peanut Butter Biscuits - Marinda Kook
seo.description: Easy peanut butter biscuits with just three ingredients — mix, roll, press flat and bake for 10 to 12 minutes until golden brown.

html: An easy test recipe, just three ingredients, perfect for when the kids suddenly want biscuits.

steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees C.
Roll into little balls and press flat with a fork.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until golden brown.
